steps.title: Read the intersection from the graph
steps.content: The solution to a graphed system is the point where the two lines cross. Here that point is at $x=4,\ y=3$.

steps.title: State the ordered pair
steps.content: The solution is $(4,3)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice B, $(4,3)$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
